headlines.description: — Myles Garrett wasn't going to let this season escape his grasp — or get away from the Browns.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garrett backs up words, Browns hang on to beat Ravens 24-22

headlines.description: — It took the Tennessee Titans a month to find themselves. This version looks pretty comfortable atop the AFC South.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans dominate Jags 20-0, get 1st home shutout since 2000

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Las Vegas Raiders were last seen in Kansas City taking a victory lap around Arrowhead Stadium in their team buses, and they decided it was wise to stomp on the Chiefs' logo at midfield shortly before kickoff Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs roll to record-setting 48-9 victory over Raiders

events.name: New Orleans Saints at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Five straight losses didn't sit well with the New Orleans Saints. So they took it out on the skidding New York Jets, and things felt just about normal again.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints end 5-game skid with 30-9 victory over skidding Jets

headlines.description: — Beating Washington looked far from a guarantee for the Dallas Cowboys after their big lead shrunk, but coach Mike McCarthy is plenty confident winning a close game is good for his team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys deliver on coach's guarantee, beat rival Washington

headlines.description: — Atlanta linebacker Mykal Walker has no explanation why the Falcons have played so well on the road this season and struggled at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan, Falcons stay hot on the road, beat Panthers 29-21

headlines.description: — Seattle’s Tyler Lockett and Hall of Famer Steve Largent share a birthday and were both born in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson has 2 TD passes as Seahawks beat Texans 33-13

headlines.description: — The grief-stricken Denver Broncos honored the late Demaryius Thomas by wearing his number on their helmets, his jersey on their backs and his memory in their hearts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos honor Demaryius Thomas with 38-10 rout of the Lions

events.name: New York Giants at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — The San Francisco 49ers took what the Bengals gave them and stayed in the playoff race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garoppolo throws 12-yard TD as 49ers beat Bengals in OT

events.name: Buffalo Bills at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — A change of uniforms hasn't affected Tom Brady's mastery of the Buffalo Bills.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tom Brady's 700th TD pass lifts Bucs over Bills 33-27 in OT

events.name: Chicago Bears at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — After an extraordinary second quarter in which the Green Bay Packers and Chicago Bears exchanged body blows, the NFL’s oldest rivalry returned to normal, with Aaron Rodgers once again delivering a knockout punch.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers throws 4 TD passes, Packers defeat Bears 45-30
